deploy.startCommand: bash -lc "set -e; HOST=${DATABASE_HOST:-postgres}; PORT=${DATABASE_PORT:-5432}; if [ -n \"${DATABASE_URL:-}\" ]; then HOST=$(node -e 'const u=new URL(process.env.DATABASE_URL); process.stdout.write(u.hostname)'); PORT=$(node -e 'const u=new URL(process.env.DATABASE_URL); process.stdout.write(u.port||5432)'); fi; /opt/wait-for-it.sh \"$HOST:$PORT\" -t 60; npm run migration:run && npm run seed:run:relational:admin && npm run start:prod"
